projectDescription: A curated list of machine learning frameworks, libraries, tools, and learning resources organized by programming language.
keyFeatures: Curated ML libraries across 30+ programming languages including Python, R, Julia, JavaScript, Go, Rust, Java, C++, and more
Coverage of major ML domains: deep learning, NLP, computer vision, reinforcement learning, data analysis
Tools section covering MLOps, experiment tracking, model serving, and vector databases
Comprehensive learning resources: books, online courses, blogs, events, and meetups
Community-maintained with contribution guidelines and deprecation tracking
publicApiSurface: Python: scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, JAX, Hugging Face Transformers
Python: spaCy, NLTK, OpenCV, Detectron2, timm
Python: Pandas, NumPy, SciPy, matplotlib, Plotly
R: caret, ggplot2, dplyr, Keras (R interface)
C++: Caffe, XGBoost, LightGBM, mlpack, DLib
Tools: MLflow, DVC, Weights & Biases, Qdrant, Milvus, Chroma
